about.label: About UGCSL
about.heroDesc: United Global Campus (Pvt) Ltd. — a newly established institution committed to delivering globally recognized, quality-driven higher education in Sri Lanka.
about.visionDesc: To become a globally recognized center of higher education by delivering innovative, quality-driven academic programs that develop knowledgeable, skilled, and socially responsible global citizens.
about.missionDesc: To deliver nationally and internationally recognized higher education programs that integrate academic excellence, practical skills, research, innovation, and leadership development, while empowering students to achieve professional success and contribute meaningfully to society.
objectives: Design and deliver nationally and internationally recognized certificates, diplomas, degrees, and professional programs.
Create a comprehensive learning environment integrating academic knowledge, practical skills, innovation, and leadership.
Promote quality higher education based on research, innovation, and societal needs.
Expand global opportunities through partnerships with local and international universities and industries.
Strengthen the link between education, professional training, and employability.
Operate in compliance with legal, ethical, and quality assurance standards.
Provide inclusive, equitable, and globally competitive higher education for all segments of society.
Contribute to positioning Sri Lanka as a leading higher education hub in South Asia.

admissions.label: Admissions
admissions.heroDesc: Applications for Semester 1 – 2026 are now open. Be among the first to join United Global Campus of Sri Lanka.
admissions.howToApplySubtitle: Our streamlined application process makes it easy to take the next step in your academic journey.

steps.title: Choose Your Program
steps.desc: Browse our diploma and degree programs and find the right fit for your career goals.

steps.title: Check Requirements
steps.desc: Review entry requirements and supporting documents needed for your chosen program.

steps.title: Submit Application
steps.desc: Complete the application form and upload all required documents.

steps.title: Receive Decision
steps.desc: Get your admission decision within 2–3 weeks of submitting a complete application.

admissions.scholarshipsDesc: UGCSL offers merit-based scholarships and financial assistance to eligible students. Contact us to learn more about available opportunities.
admissions.feesSubtitle: Transparent, affordable pricing with scholarship opportunities for eligible students.
admissions.scholarshipMeta: Merit-based and need-based scholarships for eligible students

faqs.a: Yes. UGCSL programs are designed to meet national and international recognition standards. Our diplomas are structured in alignment with Sri Lanka Qualifications Framework (SLQF) guidelines.

faqs.q: Can I study while working full-time?
faqs.a: Absolutely. All programs are 100% online and self-paced, designed specifically for working professionals and those with other commitments.

faqs.q: What are the minimum entry requirements?
faqs.a: For diploma programs, you need O/L or equivalent qualifications with minimum credits in relevant subjects, plus basic English proficiency.

faqs.q: How long does each program take?
faqs.a: All current diploma programs are 1 year (2 semesters). Each semester is approximately 6 months.

faqs.q: Is there a physical campus I need to attend?
faqs.a: No. UGCSL is a fully online institution. All lectures, assessments, and support are delivered digitally — you can study from anywhere in Sri Lanka or abroad.
Applications for Semester 1 – 2026 are currently open. The deadline is March 31, 2026. Semester 2 – 2026 applications open in May 2026.
We offer full semester payment and instalment plans. Scholarship and financial aid options are also available for eligible students — contact us to learn more.

faqs.q: How do I get my certificate?
faqs.a: Upon successful completion of all modules and assessments, your certificate will be issued digitally and can also be requested in physical form.

research.label: Research
research.heroDesc: At UGCSL, research and critical thinking are embedded in everything we do — from day one.
research.focusSubtitle: Our programs are grounded in research across four key areas aligned with our current diploma offerings.

areas.name: Psychology & Mental Health
areas.desc: Exploring human behaviour, cognitive processes, and mental wellbeing to address growing societal needs.

areas.name: Human Rights & Social Justice
areas.desc: Research into international human rights frameworks, advocacy, and policy development.

areas.name: Business & Organisational Development
areas.desc: Examining entrepreneurship, management practices, and economic development in the Sri Lankan context.

areas.name: Social Development & Community
areas.desc: Studying community-led development, social policy, and sustainable change at local and national levels.

research.collaborateDesc: We welcome collaborations with industry, government, and research institutions. If you share our vision for knowledge-driven social progress, we'd love to connect.
